{{Quote|I can't believe that either side would have chosen Parcelus Minor for a battlefield. I can't think of a worse place for armies to engage.|[[Roblio Darté]]|<ref name="Republic 61">[[Republic 61|''Republic'' 61]]</ref>}}
The '''Battle of Parcelus Minor''' in [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. A [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic]] force under [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Roblio Darté]] clashed with a [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Separatist]] army in orbit and on the surface of [[Parcelus Minor/Legends|Parcelus Minor]], a [[Swamp/Legends|swamp]] world.

==The battle==
[[File:ParcellusMinorSpaceBattle-SWR61.jpg|thumb|left|200px|The Battle of Parcelus Minor's space theater]]
Almost from the start the battle proved to be a growing series of disasters for the Republic. The first indication of trouble became evident when, due to the planet's conditions, the [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|GAR]] could not land any of its heavy equipment. The second piece of bad news came when it was discovered that [[Republic Intelligence/Legends|Republic Intelligence]] had underestimated the Separatist forces at Parcelus Minor by at least a factor of ten. On top of it all a Separatist reinforcement fleet arrived soon after the battle began, trapping the Republic army and its orbiting support fleet.

Despite incurring heavy casualties, the Republic force managed to fight off the Separatists for a protracted time. Finally the Separatist commander chose to order the execution of [[Base Delta Zero/Legends|BDZ]] against the planet; using his ships' [[Turbolaser/Legends|turbolasers]], he ignited the flammable [[tzeotine]] resin created by all of that world's plant life. The remaining Republic and Separatist ground forces were nearly eliminated in the ensuing conflagration; in the haste to evacuate, General Darté was forced to order his forces to leave all wounded troopers behind. In the end over 90% of the [[Clone trooper/Legends|clone troopers]] involved in the battle died, and it was later described as being close to a second [[Battle of Jabiim]].
